home_meta_description: Find a doctor, compare availability, and book an appointment online.
hero_body: Find available doctors by specialty and area, compare times, and book an in-person or online visit.
flow_step_one_body: Start from a symptom, a specialty, or a doctor you already know.
flow_step_two_body: Review available slots, areas, online visits, and essential profile details.
flow_step_three_body: Organize the visit and keep your details ready for next time.
mode_one_body: Local search by city, area, and available appointments.
mode_two_body: Online visits for cases that can be handled remotely.
mode_three_body: Room for organizations, services, and multiple specialties.
doctors_page_body: This is the first file route for the doctor list. Search, filters, and available appointments will live here.
clinics_page_body: This is the first file route for clinics. We will organize services, specialties, and local availability here.
plans_page_body: This is the first file route for plans. Packages, partnerships, and commercial logic will be decided here.
login_page_body: This is the first file route for sign-in. The authentication flow will connect here later.
